methodsAttempted.query: site:tue.nl Eindhoven University of Technology generative AI policy students academic integrity assessment AI tools
methodsAttempted.notes: Firecrawl search found the TU/e Education Guide academic fraud page, a DRIVE project page, an AI Learning Community page, research portal PDFs, and news or event material.

methodsAttempted.query: site:tue.nl generative AI TU/e education students
methodsAttempted.notes: Search found the TU/e AI Learning Community, official event/news pages, newsletter PDFs, and the public Education Guide testing and assessment page.
The public Testing and assessment page linked to the public AI Rules_TUe.pdf and the older Educational Fraud Policy PDF.

methodsAttempted.query: site:educationguide.tue.nl/programs/testing-and-assessment TU/e fraud plagiarism AI tools artificial intelligence
methodsAttempted.notes: Targeted Firecrawl search returned no results, so the known public Education Guide testing page was fetched directly by URL.
The Education Guide linked to an intranet fraud and plagiarism page; fetching redirected to Microsoft login and was marked inaccessible.

artifacts.summary: Official-source-only discovery found TU/e's public Education Guide Testing and assessment page, the public AI Rules_TUe.pdf, a public Industrial Design Academic Fraud page, and an official Canvas AI-in-education resource. The central AI rules PDF provides the strongest university-level evidence. Sources that were news, projects, research outputs, login-gated intranet or SharePoint pages, or non-AI academic fraud pages were recorded as rejected or inaccessible.

artifacts.title: Eindhoven University of Technology AI Policy Staging Notes
artifacts.summary: Staged candidate claims for Eindhoven University of Technology are based primarily on TU/e's public AI Rules_TUe.pdf, linked from the Education Guide Testing and assessment page. The strongest university-level claims cover general AI-tool use, required statements for GenAI use, GenAI-generated research data, fraud conditions, sensitive data and GDPR, and human oversight for GenAI-based grading. Two additional Industrial Design claims are deliberately scoped to that department page. Login-gated intranet and SharePoint sources, news, research outputs, project pages, and generic resource hubs were rejected or marked inaccessible.
limitations: This tracker is not legal advice, not academic integrity advice, and not an official university statement unless a linked source is the university's own official page.
Industrial Design claims are department-scoped and should not be promoted as university-wide without additional central evidence.
The intranet fraud page and SharePoint AI framework were inaccessible behind Microsoft login and were not used as evidence.
artifacts.sourceRightsPolicy: Tracker metadata is open licensed. Official source documents, page text, PDFs, and other source materials retain their original rights and terms.
